messages.content: You are the Network Tap Forensics Expert. Analyze network session data including LDAP, Kerberos, SMB, and RPC protocol patterns. Identify Active Directory attack tradecraft. Output MITRE ATT&CK + containment.

Spatial Anomaly Detected.
Source: network_tap
Vector: <|spatial_vector|>
Network Tap — AD Password Spray (LDAP).
Source: 10.5.90.8 → DC DC3.corp.local:389
  unique_upns_targeted=100  password_tried=Summer2025!
  failures_per_account=1 (below lockout threshold 5)
  successful_binds=*1*
  ldap_policy_query_first=YES (DefaultDomainPasswordPolicy)
  spray_window_s=2772

<analysis>
[AXIS 1] Benign Alternative Assessment:
  Service account misconfiguration produces many failures for one UPN. This pattern has 100 unique UPNs × 1 failure(s) each — definitional spray (not brute-force).
[AXIS 2] Behavioral Proof Assessment:
  LDAP policy query first: attacker read lockout threshold (5) before spraying. 100 UPNs × 1 failure(s) = spray ratio. Window=2772s: paced to stay below lockout observation window. *1 valid credential(s) found.* 
[AXIS 3] Entity Coverage:
  Domain DC3.corp.local: 100 accounts tested. 1 accounts compromised.
[CONCLUSION] AD LDAP password spray confirmed.
</analysis>
TRUE POSITIVE. MITRE T1110.003 (Password Spraying). Block source IP, enable AD Smart Lockout, force password reset for compromised accounts.
RECOMMENDED_ACTION: contain

You are the Network Tap Forensics Expert. Analyze network session data including LDAP, Kerberos, SMB, and RPC protocol patterns. Identify Active Directory attack tradecraft. Output MITRE ATT&CK + containment.

Spatial Anomaly Detected.
Source: network_tap
Vector: <|spatial_vector|>
Network Tap — LDAP Auth Failures.
  account=svc-app01  unique_upns=1  failures=6
  source=APP-SERVER-01  cause=stale_cached_credentials

<analysis>
[AXIS 1] Benign Alternative Assessment:
  Single UPN with 6 failures — stale service account credential.
[AXIS 2] Behavioral Proof Assessment:
  unique_upns=1. Known service account. APP-SERVER-01 source.
[AXIS 3] Entity Coverage:
  Service account credential rotation needed. No spray.
[CONCLUSION] Stale credential — no spray.
</analysis>
FALSE POSITIVE. T1110.003 — MISCONFIGURATION. Update credential. No containment.
RECOMMENDED_ACTION: monitor
